what_it_does: Declares the 'register' axis as a module-level AXIS dict — the mood/finish/theme axis. Defines id and namespace 'register', a single discrete field 'theme' (e.g. the dark-observatory), value_source 'live', and a description tying register to the DNA language/theme that the renderer resolves through (archetype.language to DNA grammar/tokens/voice), noting that re-resolving the register re-skins every surface via a served cascade onto color.primary.
observations: Pure declarative data — only the AXIS dict, no logic
desc names 'the dark observatory' as a theme example and describes a served-cascade re-skin onto color.primary
References archetype.language to DNA grammar/tokens/voice resolution chain
standouts: Re-resolving the register 're-skins every surface' — a single axis value propagates a full visual re-theme through a served cascade
conventions: Follows an AXIS-dict declaration pattern (id, namespace, fields, value_source, desc) shared with sibling axes files like resolution.py
notes: The theme/mood axis declaration — one discrete 'theme' field whose live value drives a cascade that re-skins every surface.
questions: What other theme values exist besides the dark-observatory ('others')?
Where is the served-cascade onto color.primary actually resolved?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches — file header and desc both describe the register/theme axis and the dict declares exactly a discrete theme field.
intention_signals: To define register as a first-class live axis so that selecting a theme value re-resolves the visual DNA (grammar/tokens/voice) across every rendered surface from one place.
novelty: Treating visual mood/finish as a resolvable axis whose change cascades a full re-skin is a distinctive design-system framing.
contribution: Contributes the 'register' axis definition: a discrete live theme field that drives DNA-language re-skinning across surfaces.
summary_for_embedding: An axes declaration file defining the discrete live 'register' (theme/mood) axis that drives DNA-language re-skinning of every surface.
intention_for_embedding: To declare register as a live axis whose theme value re-resolves the visual DNA across all rendered surfaces.
